description: Fabric8 Kubernetes Model Gateway API provides generated Java model classes and builders for the Kubernetes SIG Network Gateway API resources, including Gateway, GatewayClass, HTTPRoute, GRPCRoute, TLSRoute, TCPRoute, UDPRoute, ReferenceGrant, and related policy objects. It is part of the Fabric8 Kubernetes Client model set and lets JVM applications serialize, deserialize, and construct Gateway API resource definitions for use with Kubernetes.
